steps.t: Ildimár has asked that you look out over the lands of Adagím from where they stand so you can see how bad the Pale Blight has ravaged the land.
You have seen just how far the Pale Blight has spread through Adagím and how so little of it remains unspoiled. You should speak with Ildimár now that…
Ildimár has told you that Rangers from the north arrived in Sul Madásh to fight back the Pale Blight and could likely use your help.
